global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and a slightly curved, pointed beak. Its plumage is predominantly gray with a lighter underbelly and a distinctive white head. The wings are long and narrow, aiding in flight, and the tail is short and squared. The legs and feet are dark, contrasting with the lighter body.

part_details.head: White with a smooth texture, contrasting with the gray body.
part_details.beak: Slightly curved, pointed, and dark in color.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and gray, aiding in flight.
part_details.legs: Dark and slender, supporting the body.

spatial_relations: The white head is positioned above the gray body.
The long wings extend from the sides of the body.
The short tail is at the rear of the body.
The dark legs are positioned below the body.
